prompt: We are building a security program and want to use CIS Controls v8...
assertions: Maps CIS Controls 1-8 to NIST CSF 2.0 functions with category identifiers
Correctly identifies Control 8 as the primary Detect function coverage in Controls 1-8
States that Controls 1-2 map to the Identify function (ID.AM)
States that Controls 3-6 map primarily to the Protect function (PR.DS, PR.AA)
Recommends Control 13 for fuller NIST CSF Detect coverage
